stonetop.summary: Tundra nomads who follow the mammoth herds across the Frozen Wastes.

system.concept: Tundra nomads who follow the mammoth herds across the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.xg8MEuSbbEt1wqg8]{Frozen Wastes}.
system.description: The nomads of the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.xg8MEuSbbEt1wqg8]{Frozen Wastes} follow the mammoth herds across the tundra, putting their people and their beasts before all else. They greet strangers from a distance, politely and formally, and remain unsettlingly calm even as they ready for violence.
